jedis.signature: long hset(final byte[] key, final byte[] field, final byte[] value)

returns.description: If the field already exists, and the HSET just produced an update of the value, 0 is returned, otherwise if a new field is created 1 is returned.

jedis.signature: long hset(final byte[] key, final Map<byte[], byte[]> hash)

returns.description: If the field already exists, and the HSET just produced an update of the value, 0 is returned, otherwise if a new field is created 1 is returned.

jedis.signature: long hset(final String key, final Map<String, String> hash)

returns.description: If the field already exists, and the HSET just produced an update of the value, 0 is returned, otherwise if a new field is created 1 is returned.

nredisstack_sync.signature: HashSet(RedisKey key, HashEntry[] hashFields, CommandFlags flags = CommandFlags.None)

params.name: flags
params.description: The flags to use for this operation.

returns.description: true if field is a new field in the hash and value was set, false if field already exists in the hash and the value was updated.

params.description: Which conditions under which to set the field value (defaults to always).

returns.description: true if field is a new field in the hash and value was set, false if field already exists in the hash and the value was updated.
